docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF WANG, ANNIE AS TO DEFENDANT VALEX CONSTRUCTION
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-07-2016 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT VALEX CONSTRUCTION
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF UNSIGNED SERVED JUN-07-2016, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT VALEX CONSTRUCTION

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-07-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-07-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF ANNIE WANG, AND DEFENDANT'S REPRESENTATIVES, CONSTANTINE PRESLER, OWNER OF VALEX CONSTRUCTION, AND VAL PRESLER, ADMINISTRATIVE ASSISTANT AT VALEX CONSTRUCTION. PROOF OF SERVICE IN THE FILE IS DEFECTIVE INSOFAR AS THE RETURN RECEIPT IS NOT SIGNED. DEFENDANT'S REPRESENTATIVES WAIVE SERVICE OF PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WANG, ANNIE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT VALEX CONSTRUCTION STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,716.98 FILED BY WANG, ANNIE AS TO DEFENDANT VALEX CONSTRUCTION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-07-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
